references.reason: The gallery repeats cloud cells to the frame edge so a calibrated, frictionless Heaven reads as an oppressive pattern rather than a peaceful vista.
Repeated equal cloud cells make scheduled novelty visibly impossible in one bit.
A closed black box with a crossed-out NO field shows that the offer has removed the right to refuse.
One misaligned unplaced keystone gives the final frame a deliberate future that has not been calibrated.
The journal records Tenshi's independent Archive refusal and her choice of surprise, refusal, repair, and irregularity.
